mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, password_enabled, name, email_verified, user_type, role, status, plan, credit) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{passwordEnabled}, #{name}, #{emailVerified}, #{userType}, #{role}, #{status}, #{plan}, #{credit})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), failed_login_count = 0, last_failed_login_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET failed_login_count = failed_login_count + 1, last_failed_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE users SET status = 'ACTIVE', blocked_reason = NULL, blocked_until = NULL, status_changed_at = NOW(), status_changed_by = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'BLOCKED' AND blocked_until IS NOT NULL AND blocked_until <= NOW()
UPDATE users SET status = 'BLOCKED', blocked_reason = #{reason}, blocked_until = #{blockedUntil}, status_changed_at = NOW(), status_changed_by = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = 'ACTIVE', dormant_at = NULL, status_changed_at = NOW(), status_changed_by = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DORMANT'
UPDATE users SET email_verified = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, password_enabled = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE users SET login_id = #{loginId}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, phone_verified = CASE WHEN #{phoneNumber} IS NULL OR #{phoneNumber} = '' THEN 0 WHEN phone_number = #{phoneNumber} THEN phone_verified ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{id}
